name: ISO/IEC 27001
description: ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Annex A Information Security Controls - representative control subset

requirements.requirement_text: Policies for information security shall be defined, approved by management, published, and communicated to relevant personnel.
requirements.expected_evidence: Information security policy, management approval, employee acknowledgment
requirements.recommendation_text: Develop comprehensive information security policies approved by leadership and communicated to all personnel.

requirements.requirement_text: Information security roles and responsibilities shall be defined and allocated.
requirements.expected_evidence: RACI matrix, job descriptions with security responsibilities, org chart
requirements.recommendation_text: Define and document security roles including CISO/security officer with clear accountability.

requirements.requirement_text: An inventory of information and associated assets shall be developed and maintained.
requirements.expected_evidence: Asset register, information asset inventory
requirements.recommendation_text: Maintain a comprehensive inventory of information assets with owners and classification.

requirements.requirement_text: Rules for the acceptable use of information and assets shall be identified, documented, and implemented.
requirements.expected_evidence: Acceptable use policy, employee acknowledgment records
requirements.recommendation_text: Publish acceptable use rules covering email, internet, and data handling with employee sign-off.

requirements.requirement_text: Information shall be classified according to the organization's information security needs.
requirements.expected_evidence: Data classification scheme, classification labels on documents
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement a data classification scheme (e.g., Public, Internal, Confidential, Restricted) and apply labels.

requirements.requirement_text: Rules to control physical and logical access to information and assets shall be established.
requirements.expected_evidence: Access control policy, access management procedures
requirements.recommendation_text: Define access control rules based on business need and least privilege principles.

requirements.requirement_text: Processes for acquisition, use, management, and exit from cloud services shall be established.
requirements.expected_evidence: Cloud security policy, cloud provider assessments, shared responsibility matrix
requirements.recommendation_text: Establish cloud security governance including provider assessment and shared responsibility documentation.

requirements.requirement_text: The organization shall plan and prepare for managing information security incidents.
requirements.expected_evidence: Incident management plan, incident response procedures
requirements.recommendation_text: Develop incident management procedures with detection, reporting, assessment, and response workflows.

requirements.requirement_text: Information security continuity shall be embedded in the organization's business continuity management.
requirements.expected_evidence: Business continuity plan, DR plan, continuity test results
requirements.recommendation_text: Integrate information security requirements into BCP/DR plans with defined RTOs and RPOs.

requirements.requirement_text: Legal, statutory, regulatory, and contractual requirements relevant to information security shall be identified.
requirements.expected_evidence: Compliance register, legal requirements mapping, regulatory assessments
requirements.recommendation_text: Maintain a compliance register mapping applicable laws and regulations to security controls.

requirements.requirement_text: Personnel shall receive appropriate information security awareness, education, and training.
requirements.expected_evidence: Training program, completion records, awareness materials
requirements.recommendation_text: Deliver role-based security awareness training with annual refreshers for all personnel.

requirements.requirement_text: Security perimeters shall be defined and used to protect areas containing information and assets.
requirements.expected_evidence: Physical security policy, access control to facilities
requirements.recommendation_text: Define security perimeters for offices and data centers with appropriate access controls.

requirements.requirement_text: Information stored on, processed by, or accessible via endpoint devices shall be protected.
requirements.expected_evidence: Endpoint protection policy, MDM configuration, disk encryption
requirements.recommendation_text: Deploy endpoint protection including disk encryption, MDM, and anti-malware on all devices.

requirements.requirement_text: The allocation and use of privileged access rights shall be restricted and managed.
requirements.expected_evidence: Privileged access management policy, admin account inventory
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement PAM solution with just-in-time access and monitoring for all privileged accounts.

requirements.requirement_text: Access to information and assets shall be restricted in accordance with the access control policy.
requirements.expected_evidence: Access control implementation, RBAC configuration
requirements.recommendation_text: Enforce access restrictions aligned with the access control policy across all systems.

requirements.requirement_text: Secure authentication technologies and procedures shall be implemented.
requirements.expected_evidence: Authentication policy, MFA deployment
requirements.recommendation_text: Deploy secure authentication including MFA for all users accessing sensitive systems.

requirements.requirement_text: Configurations of hardware, software, services, and networks shall be established, documented, and monitored.
requirements.expected_evidence: Configuration baselines, change management records
requirements.recommendation_text: Document and enforce secure configuration baselines with change control procedures.

requirements.requirement_text: Information stored in systems, devices, or storage media shall be deleted when no longer required.
requirements.expected_evidence: Data retention policy, secure deletion procedures
requirements.recommendation_text: Define retention schedules and implement secure deletion when data is no longer needed.

requirements.requirement_text: Data masking shall be used in accordance with the organization's topic-specific policy on access control.
requirements.expected_evidence: Data masking policy, masking implementation in non-production environments
requirements.recommendation_text: Mask or anonymize sensitive data in development and test environments.

requirements.requirement_text: Data leakage prevention measures shall be applied to systems, networks, and endpoint devices.
requirements.expected_evidence: DLP policy, DLP tool configuration
requirements.recommendation_text: Deploy DLP controls to detect and prevent unauthorized data exfiltration.

requirements.requirement_text: Backup copies of information, software, and systems shall be maintained and regularly tested.
requirements.expected_evidence: Backup policy, backup schedules, restore test records
requirements.recommendation_text: Maintain encrypted backups with regular restore testing per defined RPO/RTO.

requirements.requirement_text: Logs that record activities, exceptions, faults, and information security events shall be produced and stored.
requirements.expected_evidence: Logging policy, log sources, centralized log storage
requirements.recommendation_text: Enable comprehensive logging on all critical systems with centralized storage and retention.

requirements.requirement_text: Networks, systems, and applications shall be monitored for anomalous behaviour and security events.
requirements.expected_evidence: Monitoring tools, SIEM rules, SOC procedures
requirements.recommendation_text: Deploy continuous monitoring with SIEM integration and defined alert response procedures.

requirements.requirement_text: Procedures and measures shall be implemented to securely manage software installation on operational systems.
requirements.expected_evidence: Software installation policy, change management procedures
requirements.recommendation_text: Control software installation through change management and application allowlisting where feasible.

requirements.requirement_text: Networks and network devices shall be secured, managed, and controlled to protect information in systems and applications.
requirements.expected_evidence: Network security architecture, firewall rules, segmentation documentation
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement network segmentation, firewall controls, and secure remote access.

requirements.requirement_text: Rules for the effective use of cryptography, including cryptographic key management, shall be defined and implemented.
requirements.expected_evidence: Cryptographic policy, key management procedures, encryption standards
requirements.recommendation_text: Define cryptographic standards and implement centralized key management.

requirements.requirement_text: Rules for the secure development of software and systems shall be defined and applied.
requirements.expected_evidence: Secure development policy, SDLC documentation, security gates
requirements.recommendation_text: Integrate security into the SDLC with threat modeling, code review, and security testing gates.

requirements.requirement_text: Secure coding principles shall be applied to software development.
requirements.expected_evidence: Secure coding standards, SAST results, code review records
requirements.recommendation_text: Train developers on secure coding and enforce standards through automated scanning and review.

requirements.requirement_text: Security testing processes shall be defined and implemented in the development life cycle.
requirements.expected_evidence: Security test plan, penetration test reports, DAST/SAST results
requirements.recommendation_text: Include security testing (SAST, DAST, penetration testing) in every release cycle.
